name: Cran-Raspberry Jam
recipeIngredient: 2 packages (10 oz each) sweetened frozen raspberries, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the raspberries and reserve the juice. Add enough water to the reserved juice to measure 1 1/2 cups.
2. Pour into a large kettle. Add the raspberries, cranberries, and sugar; bring to a full rolling boil, stirring constantly.
3. Stir in the pectin and return to a full rolling boil.
4. Boil for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
5. Remove from heat, skim off any foam, then pour into hot jars, leaving 1/4-inch headspace.
6. Adjust lids and process for 15 minutes in a boiling-water bath.
